description:
You are debugging a severe memory leak in a web application. 

1. A test page is open at file:///home/ga/Documents/memory_leak.html.
2. Click the 'Generate Memory Leak' button on the page and wait for the status text to confirm the leak was generated.
3. Open the Firefox Web Developer Tools (F12 or via the menu).
4. Navigate to the 'Memory' tab in DevTools.
5. Click 'Take snapshot' to capture the current state of the JavaScript heap.
6. Once the snapshot finishes processing, click 'Save' and save the file EXACTLY as '/home/ga/Documents/heap_analysis.fxsnapshot'.
